I am particularly interested in learning SAP S/4 Hana and believe that the digital skills initiative by SAP Learning is a fantastic opportunity for individuals like myself. Regards,

NKM

entry.title: Unable to assign Warehouse with Storage location and plant
entry.content:
Hi,

We have TDD system, and we are working with SAP S4 Hana Public Cloud Embedded Warehouse Management, created Cloud Warehouse and Warehouse number but I am not getting any option for warehouse and storage location assignment. 

Kindly suggest.

Thanks,

Sanjay

entry.title: Custom changes in GGB1 doesn't carry over or apply
entry.content:
So we created a custom logic in GGB1 specifically in exit U0001. Z_OBJECT calls the U0001. 

Since the ZOBJECT, I have created a logic for BSEG-FDTAG.

Initially, the value of BSEG-FDTAG is initial and my logic is below:

BSEG-FDTAG = SY-DATUM + BSEG-ZBD1T. Assuming the values will be 08/31/2024

However, after exiting the ZOBJECT, the value of BSEG-FDTAG will be 00000000 again. Why does that happen?

The flow of FDTAG determination is like this:

ZOBJECT> sapff001> ZOBJECT. 

The first time it will go through the ZOBJECT the FDTAG will be 08/31/2024. Then it will go to the program sapff001, there, the value of FDTAG will be 00/00/0000 before computation.

There is a computation for FDTAD in sapff001 however, the conditions were not satisfied hence, I'm not getting the correct results.

entry.title: TDS exemption calculation issue
entry.content:
Hello experts

 

We have a query from the user where the user has maintained TDS exemption of Rs 50 lakhs and exemption percentage as 44% for the vendor from May 2024 to May 2025

Now the FI invoices upto Rs 1,166,628 (modified net amount)  are posted correctly where total TDS amount of Rs 65331.168 

calculation is as follows 

net amount  -                 1 ,166,628

less 44% exempt-          513316.32

Balance amount             653,312

10% TDS on balance amount -  65331.168

Now the latest invoice posted has modifed net amount of Rs 3,955,000, but system has deducted TDS of Rs 90,732.65 only instead of actual TDS amount whose calculation  is as follows

 

net amount  -                 3,955,000

less 44% exempt-          1740200

Balance amount             2,214,800

10% TDS on balance amount -  221480

 

Can anyone guide as to how Rs 90732 is deducted instead of  Rs 221480

entry.title: Streamlining Document Management: DocuSign and SAP Sales Cloud V2 Integration via BTP
entry.content:
In today’s digital era, streamlining document workflows is essential for businesses to stay competitive. Integrating DocuSign, a leading e-signature solution, with SAP Sales Cloud V2 can enhance the efficiency of managing contracts and agreements directly within your CRM system. Leveraging SAP BTP Open Connectors, this integration becomes seamless, allowing for a smooth exchange of data between DocuSign and SAP Sales Cloud V2.

There is no standard integration available between DocuSign and SAP Sales Cloud V2. However, we developed this integration as a proof of concept (POC) using SAP BTP Open Connectors. This POC demonstrates how businesses can streamline their document workflows by connecting DocuSign with SAP Sales Cloud V2. The integration was custom-built to showcase the potential benefits, including improved efficiency and better data management. Although this solution is not out-of-the-box, it serves as a solid foundation for future implementations tailored to specific business needs.

Why Integrate DocuSign with SAP Sales Cloud V2?

Integrating DocuSign with SAP Sales Cloud V2 brings several advantages:

  1. Improved Efficiency: Automate the process of sending, signing, and storing documents, reducing the need for manual intervention.
  2. Enhanced Compliance: Ensure all documents are securely stored and easily retrievable, meeting legal and regulatory requirements.
  3. Seamless User Experience: Allow users to manage the entire document lifecycle within SAP Sales Cloud V2, avoiding the need to switch between platforms.  

 

Prerequisites:

  • SAP BTP Account
  • DocuSign Account
  • SAP Sales Cloud V2 Access
  • Open Connectors Setup
  • OAuth2 Authentication Knowledge
  • Integration Suite Knowledge

Overview of SAP BTP Open Connectors

SAP BTP Open Connectors is a key component of the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) that simplifies and accelerates the connectivity to third-party applications. With over 160 pre-built connectors, Open Connectors provides a unified API layer to integrate various services with SAP solutions.

For our integration, Open Connectors will act as the bridge between SAP Sales Cloud V2 and DocuSign, enabling seamless communication and data exchange.

Step-by-Step Integration Guide : Setting Up DocuSign in SAP BTP Open Connectors

  1. Access SAP BTP Cockpit:
    • Log in to your SAP BTP Cockpit and navigate to the Open Connectors service.
  2. Create a Connector Instance:
    • In the Open Connectors dashboard, search for "DocuSign" and create a new connector instance.
    • Provide necessary credentials such as the API key, account ID, and user authentication details to establish the connection.
  3. Configure Authentication:
    • Follow the prompts to authenticate the DocuSign account using OAuth2. This ensures secure communication between SAP BTP and DocuSign.

Integrating with SAP Sales Cloud V2: Create a Custom Integration Flow

    • In SAP BTP Integration Suite, create a new integration flow to connect SAP Sales Cloud V2 with DocuSign.
    • Use the Open Connectors adapter to integrate the DocuSign connector instance you previously set up.

Define the Integration Logic:

    • Map the fields between SAP Sales Cloud V2 and DocuSign. For instance, map customer details, document templates, and signature fields.
    • Configure triggers for the integration, such as automatically sending a document for signature when a sales order reaches a certain status.

Deploying the Integration :Deploy the Integration Flow

    • Once testing is successful, deploy the integration flow in the SAP BTP Integration Suite.
    • Monitor the flow to ensure smooth operation and handle any exceptions that may occur.

Story Flow

1.Generate a sales quote

2.Please set the status and send the quote to DocuSign for approval.

3.The Contact of the Account will receive an email notification.

4.Please review the document and sign it

5.Once the document is signed and the 'Finish' button is clicked, the signed document will be returned to the Sales Quote

6.Click on the preview icon to view the document.

Conclusion

Integrating DocuSign with SAP Sales Cloud V2 via SAP BTP Open Connectors provides a robust solution to streamline your document workflows. This integration not only enhances efficiency but also ensures that your sales processes are more secure and compliant.

By following the steps outlined in this guide, you can leverage the full potential of both DocuSign and SAP Sales Cloud V2, driving better outcomes for your business.

entry.title: Re: Annotation to add Parameters for Intent Based Navigat...

entry.title: SAP Datasphere Replication Flows: Error Object-Queue / Calculation not finished, ACD doesn't exist
entry.content:
Dear SAP Datasphere Community,

yesterday, I stumbled upon an issue for which I could not find the problem, since the error message does not tell what and where the root cause is lying and what the solution is 🤔

I’m wondering how long it is going to take until SAP provides error messages providing the solution, to prevent a new incident?!

FYI: After the last S4 update in March 2024, I updated this week again all the required CNV_NOTE_ANALYZER_DI notes in the S4 Dev. system.

There are currently two main problems I’m facing and hopefully the one or the other member here has already found out the root case and solution to maybe help be out?!

Error 1:

I have one Replication Flow containing 31 CDS Views, all for texts, which are loaded in “Initial only” mode. Initially, all the replications failed with this error:

English:

Abonnement Interface error / User JOB_User is not authorized, to process changes for Abonn. RMS

I changed nothing, just checked that user JOB_USER is valid (and still has SAP_ALL), then repeated the run, and the result is: 2/3 of the updates worked, 1/3 failed:

Error message now:

Either:  Partitioning for Object I_CONDITIONTYPETEXT failed

Or: Abonnement Interface error / User JOB_User is not authorized, to process changes for Abonn. RMS / Error with access to Object-Queue / Calculation not finished, but ACD doesn't exist for Object I_COMPANY CODE (Type DDLS).

The only note which gives a hint regarding “ACD” is this one from July 2023: https://me.sap.com/notes/3360383/E

Which contains: “Calculation not finished but ACD doesn't exists for object ... (type DDLS)”

Error 2:

I also started 2 replication flows with “Initial and Delta” for transactional data (Orders and Invoice items)… and all the records got transferred successfully… but the CDC Monitor does not show any single entry any more:

and

In our Dev system, there is the specialty that development takes place in client 100, and test data exists only in client 110. So all the extraction is done for client 110.

The Health check is running fine in both clients:

And also the two DELTA PUSH jobs (for the initialization) have been running fine:

Has anyone an idea what else to check... otherwise I will open an Incident for this.

Edit: Even SLG1 protocols does not show anything for the DWCREMOTE User in our connection - in earlier issue cases at least a log has been writting... but here: Nothing.

Thanks a lot for reading. BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: SAP Service and Asset Manager 2405 Now Available – What’s New?
entry.content: Dynamic form is interesting.

entry.title: Attribute-based access control in SAP Signavio Process Insights
entry.content:
SAP Signavio Process Insights Attribute-based access management is now general availability (GA) in all regions.

This is enabling you to limit access for your users to combinations of companies 🏛, plants 🏭 and sales organization 💰 values in addition to the already existing system-based and functional access control. Here is a quick demo:

The new "Create Policy" option is available for SAP on-premise source systems and allows you to configure access not only at system level, but also based on organizational attributes and their values from connected source systems.

If you already have any systems connected for which system access is restricted to specific users, system-specific authorization policies named "All Attribute Values" are available automatically for each system. These authorization policies allow full access to all data for the previously specified users in the same way as before.

  • The details on how to configure attribute-based access management are available in our help
  • You find all details on what is new in our help (don't forget to subscribe).

Interested to learn more about the merits of Signavio Process Insights? Here you can see how to find ways to optimize your liquidity:

Here you can learn more:

  1. Your first steps to get started with SAP Signavio Process Insights
  2. Who do I need to involve and which challenges do I want to solve?
  3. How to start your analysis?
  4. “Cash is King” - but how to become royal? - SAP Community
  5. Why are there two business process analysis soluti... - SAP Community
  6. Plug & Gain:
    Plug & Gain OpenSAP
    How to use the Plug & Gain Connector
    Optimize financial closing process with Plug & Gain
  7. SAP Analytics Cloud Content for Process Insights
  8. SAP Learning:
    SAP Signavio Process Analysis
    SAP Signavio Process Management & Design
    SAP Signavio Solution Configuration
  9. Partner Edge (Login required): Webinar Series for Process Insights
  10. SAP Signavio Process Insights "Whats New?"
  11. SAP Signavio Process Insights Help

entry.title: Re: Resource scheduling app- Order operation is confirmed but in scheduling still showing not comple

Best regards, Matjaž.

entry.title: Re: How to restrict the webhook event notifications from...
entry.content:
Hi @DeepakGupta,

Good day.

By managing webhook configurations individually at the site level and ensuring that they are set up specifically for each child site, you can effectively restrict webhook event notifications in SAP CDC. This way, events like 'register' configured in Child Site A will not trigger webhooks in Child Site B.

Considerations:

  • Permissions and Scope: Make sure that webhook configurations are correctly scoped to only the desired child site. This means double-checking that each webhook is set up with the appropriate filters and criteria to ensure it only triggers when events occur within its specific site.

  • Testing: Before deploying these configurations in a production environment, perform extensive testing to confirm that webhooks are firing only for the desired child sites and not across all sites inadvertently.

Best Regards,
Preethi G
SAP CDC Consultant

entry.title: Re: CATS_GET_TARGET_HOURS
entry.content: ALWAYS A THIRD PARTY TOOL DOES THAT

entry.title: Re: How to restrict the webhook event notifications from...
entry.content: To add on Preethi's suggestion, you need to setup/configure the Permission Group access accordingly under Administrator section.

entry.title: Re: How to refresh screen with 2 grids?
entry.content:
Maybe it helps to call method FREE of containers and ALVs. Example for split_cont:

if split_cont is NOT INITIAL.
        split_cont->free( ).
        FREE split_cont.
      endif.

entry.title: Re: Unpaid leave amount not showing for certain employee...

entry.title: Re: ABAP Unit for local classes inside function group?
entry.content:
Hi sh4il3sh,

If you put the unit test class into the T99 include of the function group, like you should: https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-development-tools-user-guide/where-to-write-abap-unit-test..., you can directly assign your needed value to the variable of the TOP include before calling your code under test in the unit test method.

BR,
Alex

entry.title: CAP Build Code & Joule project deployment to CF
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to deploy my CAP project (named cap_bc) created using SAP Build code and Joule to SAP BTP subaccount/space. I added mta.yml file using command "cds add mta" and manifest.json file is already there in "webapp" folder. Deployment is also almost successful but at the end I am getting error related to metadata as below -

"Application "cap_bc-srv" started and available at "f*******trial-dev-cap-bc-srv.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com"
Skipping deletion of services, because the command line option "--delete-services" is not specified.
Process finished.

Use "cf dmol -i 1f04c7e0-6111-11ef-9e05-eeee0a8230ab" to download the logs of the process.
cf update-user-provided-service cap_bc-metadata -t "DeployedUTCTime: 2024-08-23T05:33:53.331Z"
Updating user provided service cap_bc-metadata in org f0*****trial / space dev as s************1@gmail.com...
Service instance 'cap_bc-metadata' not found
FAILED
Exit error code: 1 "
 
I do not see any user provided service and anything like "cap_bc-metadata" in my mta.yml/ package.json files. I am attaching my mta.yml & package.json files also.
 
Further, is there any other way to deploy Build Code project? I am trying to deploy in regular way mostly manually by adding mta yml files etc. Kindly guide me with the steps.
 
Thanks in advance.
- Saurabh

entry.title: Re: Welcome
entry.content:
Dear @JamesPhamFSO 

we are currently working on a sign-up functionality for future SAP Learning MOOCs. 
As of now you don't have to sign up for this course. 
Nevertheless to track your progress i would recommend to be logged in on learning.sap.com.
You can track your progress in your profile (top right corner on the screen) in the "Activity" section of the navigation panel. 

The course content is going to be published and available on August 28, 2024.

Many thanks for learning with SAP Learning.
Enjoy the course.

Eva
(SAP Learning team)

entry.title: customer payment request and issuing invoice to customer at item level
entry.content:
hello, guys

In our real business, there is a scenario I've ran into, and hope guys can give me some guidance.

we operate EPC projects, and the project period is long, more than 1 year. As for our sales contract billinging, we obey milestone billing such as 

20% percentage down payment

40% partial payment

30% partial payment

10% final payment

these items above are our customer payment requrest at contract level.

but when we issue invoice to our customer, that means on financial booking with AR as well as our revenue and sales tax, we need to include specific products  we provided in order. And normally the invoicing will be partial.

for example: we have 5 products A,B,C,D,E in our sales order .

the first time we issue invoice to customer, invoice items include A,B,E

the second time we issue invoice to customer, invoice items include C,D

and final invoice to customer, we need issue invoice with installment service.

I want get some advice, how to deal this in SD order - To combine and differciate the customer payment request and invoicing in SAP sales order? Is it neccessary to use header billing plan or not?  

thanks a lot

Emma

Hi,

When you say you want to display from a browser, a few questions:

  • Are these attachments in the browser created with the Fiori Apps ?
  • The current viewer you are using in SAPGUI, is it a standard SAPGUI viewer or a viewer from another provider such as OpenText ?

entry.title: 回复： Horizontal scroll in RAP
entry.content: As far as I know, annotation can't accomplish this. You're probably previewing the fiori temp interface via eclipse adt. ABAP RAP still needs to generate the frontend fiori elements project by using Business Application Studio or VS Code. After this, you will get the 'manifest.json' file.

entry.title: Custom Entity does not display all line items
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I have created a custom entity based on Maintenance order i_maintenanceordertp and Operation I_Maintenanceorderoperationtp to get the measuring point based.

when i execute the custom entity i get only 20 records i am not able to get all the records in display 

i have written following code 

DATA(top) = CONV i( io_request->get_paging( )->get_page_size( ) ).

DATA(lv_skip) = CONV i( io_request->get_paging( )->get_offset( ) ).

DATA(lv_max_rec) = top + lv_skip.

 

and using lv_max_rec in my select

SELECT *

FROM i_maintenanceordertp WITH PRIVILEGED ACCESS

WHERE (lv_conditions)

ORDER BY maintenanceorder

INTO TABLE @@DATAlt_mo) UP TO @lv_max_rec ROWS. " OFFSET @LV_skip.

Please help and guide me at your earliest to get all the rows displayed in the output.

Thanks for your help and quick guidance.  
Nitin

entry.title: Re: Get token in SAP Foundry for API api.cf.eu10.hana.ondemand.com
entry.content:
Hi Gregor.

I am trying to get the bearer token with the authorization endpoint POST https://login.cf.eu20.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token?grant_type=password and passed CF username and password(same user used for cf login) in the body but it gives invalid_client error. With the access token I want to access the CF API /v3/audit_events to get the deployed app's audit events. When I pass the token returned by CF command cf oauth-token I am able to get the audit events. Looking to get the same token with REST client.

In the git example the authorization header has been passed with some static value which is confusing. 

'Authorization': 'Basic Y2Y6'
Could you please advise with the right authorization header and user to be used to fetch the bearer token?
 
Thanks, Ravindra

entry.title: Re: Automatic Hire

We have enabled this feature, but noticed the compensation information (Paycomponent) filled in ONB when auto hire and final review feature enabled are not reflected in Employee profile however without this feature it is reflected.

Any specific thing we need to check why it is not reflected.

entry.title: Re: Custom Shell plugin in Mobile start not visible
entry.content:
Dear @jaivijay,

SAP Mobile Start is a mobile native app, whereas shell plugins added to SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition are based on the web technology SAP UI5. Shell plugins won't appear on the native screens of SAP Mobile Start – your expectation that it would appear and work in the mobile app is not matching the supported features by SAP Mobile Start.

Alternatives you may have to offer a navigation to the configured IBN to your endusers:
As an enduser you may use the "Favorites" functionality of SAP Mobile Start to pin apps that are relevant to you to the "Start" tab. As an admin you may instead create an app tile in SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition Site Manager in order to put it onto the Site (e.g. using "Groups") and make it visible on the "Apps" tab of Mobile Start to all the users in possession of the matching role. Please note that by this second approach the app would also be visible in the web as tile on the Site. 

For further questions or in order to discuss your use-case with our product management team, feel free to reach out to our email inbox sapmobilestart@sap.com.

Best,
Thomas

entry.title: Colon is missing in time format when using the tstmp_to_tims () function in CDS views.
entry.content:
Hello,

I am using below code to fetch the time from timestamp, and it is in case condition.

tstmp_to_tims( test.timestamp,
               abap_system_timezone( $session.client,'NULL' ),
                       $session.client,
                    'NULL' )
                      end  as field_time.

I am getting time in field_time but it is coming as "152334" and i want as "15:23:34".

Please let me know how we can add colon ? how i can get in mentioned format.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business ByDesign – What’s New 24.08
entry.content:
Hello,

Please find the answers to your questions below.

1. If "Peppol-related" checkbox is marked for one or more bank accounts, then the ones which are marked will be displayed in the peppol outgoing xml. If none of the bank accounts are marked as "Peppol-related" then all the bank accounts which are maintained in My Bank, will be displayed in peppol outgoing xml.

2. This determination of which bank accounts should be displayed in peppol outgoing xml is done within ByDesign.

3. Yes, Customer would need to buy a license for SAP Document and Reporting Compliance in order to integrate ByDesign with Peppol.

 

Please let us know if you have any further queries.

Thank you.

Regards,

Anurag

entry.title: Re: SAP PS - Configure Budget Availability Control
entry.content:
These table are very heavy, could not able to execute.

COVP/COEP: Actual costs.

The database registered an internal error. SQLcode 4. The error text is: cannot allocate enoughmemory: [9] Memory allocation failed;exception1000002: Allocation failed ; $size$=1048576;$name$=aggregates; $type$=pool;inuse_count$=192337;$allocated_size$=162678920480;$failure_type$=GLOBAL_ALL

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to use own IdP User for SAP HANA CLOUD...
entry.content:
"Using this IdP user as database user" can mean 2 things, so just answering for both:

1. Either: Allow the IdP user to log in to HANA Cloud instead of using the internal users created in HANA Cloud. Yes, this is possible, see for example here where the SAP Identity Authentication service (IAS) is used as IdP for HANA Cloud: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/setup-single-sign-on-in-sap-hana-cloud-administration-tools/ba-p/13567752

2. Or: Use the IdP user within the CAP application to connect to HANA Cloud to retrieve app data. This is not advised. CAP uses a single/central technical user to connect to the database, and you will have to use the authorization framework (@requires) to restrict access based on the user's profile/roles. If every user/session would require its own database connection this would introduce a lot of latency in opening/closing connections.

entry.title: Re: Third-Party Keyboards FSM [iOS]
entry.content: Hi, we are facing the same issue. We developed an own third party app and we cannot add it to the keyboards in the FSM mobile app. Version is 24.08.0. Could you please check why this is happening? A while ago, SAP recommended us to create our own app to have a proper numeric keyboard and now we cannot add it to SAP FSM Mobile app... Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Create Task for Warehouse request ByDesign using Site...
entry.content: Dear LaurensSteffers, please understand that the system only supports users to create warehouse request from UI end.

entry.title: Re: Unable to import standard content IFP for SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear @dan12,

as the name indicates the Cross-model Add-on for Integrated Financial Planning is an add-on package.

To successfully import the package into your SAC tenant you either need to:

  • import the following packages from the business content network prior to the import of the add-on package:
    • Operational Workforce Planning
    • Portfolio Financial Planning for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition / Private Edition
    • Commercial Planning
    • Consumer Products Sales Target Planning

or

  • deselect the related objects if you don't want to import a certain package, for:
    •  Operational Workforce Planning
      • all objects containing "WFP"
    • Portfolio Financial Planning
      • all objects containing "PFP"
    • Commercial Planning
      • all objects containing "CXCP"
    • Consumer Products Sales Target Planning
      • all objects containing "CPSP"

From your screenshot it looks like the Operational Workforce Planning content is not available on your tenant.

Best regards
Susanne

entry.title: Re: Create Task for Warehouse request ByDesign using Site...
entry.content: Warehouse Request cannot be created from API side nor Code side.

Thanks,
Prasanth

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to use own IdP User for SAP HANA CLOUD...
entry.content:
Thanks @Willem_Pardaens  ! I followed the instruction of answer one. But in step 3 you need to create a database user. 

My question is, if I can somehow skip this step. So that automatically my user from IDP is created as DB user.

 

E.g. when I use the SAP Build or integration suite, what I do is only creating a user in Cloud identity service. Associate a user group. 2) Associate this user group on BTP to the necessary role collections.  

-> I don't need to match and map, neither create the user again.

This is the main difference from the case in HANA Cloud DB, its works fine for the application level but not to the db user level.

entry.title: Re: Net Working Cycle Time in SAP Signavio Process Intell...
entry.content:
Hi Niels,

I would recommend that you make a copy of the metric that you talk about, in the Process that you have created.

Here in the screen shot I made a copy of the standard Average Cycle Time. Once you make a copy you need to adjust the SIGNAL query to suit your needs.

And then you can drag the new named metrix into any the Investigation widgets for any dashboard within that specific process. 

I am not the greatest at queries, but I have also thought i need brushen up in order to make the most of SIGANVIO Process Intelligence and Insights. 

I have a feeling that one can you use the function DURATION_BETWEEN and the calendar IDs.

I am gonna test that later, but here comes the syntax

 

 

Best! 🙌

entry.title: User is automatically activated after Hiring employee
entry.content:
Why users are automatically assigned to Standard Self-Service Users?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Cannot create a vendor with grouping XXXX
entry.content: This is the Path in S4 HANA 2023

entry.title: Re: User is automatically activated after Hiring employee
entry.content:
Any employee hired in the system will have a business user with the mandatory work center views will directly be assigned to Standard Self-Service Users. This user is in validity period and can log in to the system and therefore, the user is counted in the license calculation. If you do not want any user to be part of license consumption, then that user can be locked from the screen.

If the number of active users exceeds the number of licensed users, either adjust the number of users assigned to work centers and views or request additional user licenses. To request more user subscriptions, contact your SAP Business ByDesign representative, or your SAP partner.

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content: Hi Please find below my solution

entry.title: Re: Problem of copying text from service order to billing document item level texts
entry.content:
Hi Nassima,

at item level we provide the text type / note "Sales Text" to further specify the product details. This text type is copied to the billing document item. Other text types such as Billing Instructions are not yet supported for Service Orders.

Best regards,
Julius

entry.title: Re: how to inject the clientId/secret to OAuth2UserTokenE...
entry.content:
You can use these settings to have the destination created with the credentials from the service-key:

destinations:
  - Name: custapp-api
    Authentication: OAuth2UserTokenExchange
    TokenServiceInstanceName: custapp-auth
    TokenServiceKeyName: custapp-auth-key
    URL: ~{srv-api/srv-url}
    HTML5.DynamicDestination: true
    WebIDEEnabled: true
    WebIDEUsage: odata_gen

entry.title: Issue regarding the missing home page for a specific persona in the SAP Service Asset Manager 2405
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Currently, we are accessing the SAP Service Asset Manager 2405 application within the S/4HANA(Version - 2022) and kyma environment. We can access the application through our credential but After the initial sync was successfully completed, we are encountering a missing home screen issue. We are unable to view the Home Page

I have attached the log screenshots for your reference

Could anyone please provide some insights or suggestions to resolve this issue?






SAP HANA service for SAP BTP , SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP Business One 
#SAP Service and Asset Manager,   #SAP Mobile Services,  #SAP Mobile Asset Management , SAP BTP, Kyma runtime , SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud

entry.title: Reduce project cycle time & improve efficiency using SAP Project Collaboration Management in SAP PRM
entry.content:
In today’s digital, fast paced, and interconnected world, it becomes imperative that projects need to be run at speed and efficiency. Project lifecycles have condensed and focus on collaboration between project stakeholders has never been more critical. Success clearly lies in cooperation, trust, reducing risk and increasing efficiency between intra and inter organizational members.

The complexity of modern projects demands a seamless integration between various stakeholders - owners, contractors, subcontractors, engineers, architects, facility managers, and authorities.

This challenge posits a question: “How can project managers increase project efficiency, transparency and reduce the complexity of information exchange - between internal and external project stakeholders - while maintaining their individual objectives and incentives”?

Project Collaboration Management as part of SAP Project and Resource Management addresses this specific whitespace.

 

Need for Project Collaboration Management

Project activity Interdependency: Stakeholders in cross company projects sometimes cut across different geographies and organizations. Coordinating with these diverse members requires a robust collaboration framework to ensure that all parties are on the same page.

Inefficiency in Traditional Methods: Traditional methods of collaboration, such as emails and phone calls, are not only time-consuming but also error prone. Information shared through different systems can lead to miscommunication and delays.

Compliance to Standards: In industries such as Engineering and Construction, adhering to standards like building information modelling (BIM) and maintaining a common data environment is crucial for project success. Projects also have their templates to comply with and adhered by all members.

 

Capabilities of Project Collaboration Management

Share Project Information: This centralized and integrated toolset provides a single source of truth to enhance project transparency and collaboration to also to track and control both management and execution processes. Features such as GANTT chart and KANBAN board provide visibility to activities and enable agile decision making. Project Managers can share project plans with external partners and import project timelines from 3rd party scheduling tools using various file formats such as .mpp, .mpx, .mpd, .xer. This enables Project Managers to manage multiple versions of project plans e.g., from tools like Oracle Primavera or MS Project and use these versions to compare against initial timeline.

Native integration with Enterprise Projects in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition allows users to import project WBS elements from underlying system and use them as the basis for project structure. In addition, one can also import the projects WBS structure from Project System in SAP S/4HANA by using the SAP Integration suite. For integration with EPPM (Portfolio and Project Management) in SAP S/4HANA, a consulting service is offered to define the corresponding iFlows in the SAP Integration Suite. This approach utilizes APIs for custom integrations which enables users to bring-in project timeline information from any kind of project scheduling tools.

Support for Digital Twin: SAP Project Collaboration Management is an open, flexible, and expandable solution that supports digital twin lifecycle from as-designed to as-built. Project Managers can share digital models in a central repository to connect cross company and organizational processes. Distributed project information can be visualized and connected using a digital twin that complies with local and international standards and actions on the digital twin can be monitored by assigning issues, changes, and tasks.

 

 

Issue and Change management: The tool helps Project Managers simplify Task, Risk, Issue and Change Request by providing option to classify and document project problems with detailed information such as notes, member responsible, related objects and photos. It provides flexibility to manage authorizations at both individual and team level. Project Managers can use the automated review and approval process to collaborate across internal and external stakeholders on topics that impact project cost, scope, quality, and schedule.

Risks, Issues and Change Requests

 

Risk Heat chart

Benefits of Using Project Collaboration Management

Streamlined Processes: The tool provides a digitized and automated information flow between all internal and external project stakeholders. This helps avoid manual steps, reduce errors, and decrease waste of time and materials. Collaborative project management ensures that all stakeholders are aligned, leading to faster project completion times and adherence to higher quality standards.

Enhanced Efficiency: Features like document management, cross-company project master plans, risk, task and issue management, and visual budget control significantly improve process efficiency. Automation of manual tasks leads to a more productive workforce.

Increased transparency: An integrated toolset for project management and work management results in a single source of truth for project information. It provides users visibility to upstream and downstream processes and the right information leading to fewer claims disputes, resulting in better customer relationships.

Reduced Rework and Cycle time: By improving collaboration, companies can reduce rework and waste by up to 50%*. This not only saves time but also reduces costs associated with time and material wastage. Collaborative project management can also reduce cycle times for approvals and workflows by up to 60%*, ensuring that projects move forward without unnecessary delays.

*Source: SAP experts estimate based on co-innovation customer engagements

 

Conclusion

A study by PMI states that collaborative project management tools can increase the success rate of projects by 71%. With its numerous benefits, SAP Project Collaboration can help Project managers deliver real business value. Thus, by leveraging Project Collaboration Management within SAP Project and Resource Management, companies can increase efficiency, build trust and transparency, and meet the complexity and demands of new-age projects.

 

You can learn more about SAP Project and Resource Management at the following pages:

  • SAP Product Page: SAP Project and Resource Management
  • SAP Help portal: SAP Project and Resource Management | SAP Help Portal
  • SAP Community Page: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and Project Control

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam in Warsaw: Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core
entry.content:
I made I mistake in a date. It was 21.09 but should be 20.09. Now corrected.

Bartek

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - EWM Goods Receipt Failed
entry.content: Thank you for your support. The HU number is created by the DM system based on the parameters we create in the DM app “Manage Next Numbers”. Will do, thanks 🙂

entry.title: Re: Category Management with SAP Ariba
entry.content:
Hello @Praveen_Rohan 
Thanks for your kind words and perpetual support 🙂

Regarding the query, I believe CatMan solution is really helpful for the purpose. Without it, you may best use Standard or Custom Reports & Spend Analysis for analyzing data and working it out separately based on the Category management practices at the firm. You can refer the CatMan solution demo for steps and overall guidance on the process to be followed. It would be great to eventually move on to this solution for the purpose.

entry.title: Re: CICD Release failed
entry.content:
first go to terminal > cf login

email : <email>

pass:<pass>

select subaccount 

----------------------------------------------------------

2)   second command >> git add .

git commit -m "cf login error solve"

git push origin main

-------------------end----------------------

entry.title: Re: MDG DQM derivation for BP role
entry.content: Hi Riccardo, thank you for your input. All the above conditions are configured but still the rule is not working. As per section 5.3, I have added Valid To date as well in the result table for deriving role. In this table, the result fields are Role and Valid To date which I am trying to derive based on BP Grouping field in the Condition table. I am also trying to derive Company Code based on BP Grouping field in the same Rule Id but it's not working. I am aware if the entity type concept but can you please help me to understand section 5.3. w.r.t defining DQM rule.

entry.title: Is it possible to maintain more than 4 characters while configuring Code List in SAP Service Cloudv2
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When we try to enter more than 4 characters while configuring code list in SAP Service Cloud v2, we are receiving below error message.

"Code cannot exceed more than 4 characters"

Is it possible to increase the character limit in code?

If possible, what is the setting that we need to do.

 

Regards,

Syed Muheed

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM Screen Personas - Field cannot be moved
entry.content: Yes, I had an ongoing case with you about the "dump/internal server error/crash" when editing previously but we where not able to easily reproduce it. We discovered that changing RF creates a lot of changes so clearing the flavor history seemed to help a little but we still get this error from time to time. It seems to be when I do a lot of changes at once before pressing "Save" but it's a bit random. Thankfully, it's less common now in new releases of Personas and after clearing the history.

entry.title: Re: Incoming/Outgoing Payment and Bank Connectivity
entry.content:
Hi @路人甲-WS ,

Question 1
How to configure XML and RFC during the implementation of the SAP ES version of bank-enterprise direct connection is shown in the following figure

Question 3;
For SAP's implementation of bank-enterprise direct connection, is the system configuration as follows

Answer to Q1&Q3:

please check the J60-China  -> Accelerators -> Test script (Chinese) , also this would be very helpful. Electronic Payment Integration (EPIC) | SAP Help Portal

Here i attached the Latest version

where you will get the preparation steps including how to configure RFC+ and how to configure steps

question 2. For the implementation of the direct connection between banks and enterprises, if you need to obtain bank collection information, is it the same to query electronic receipt when you receive telegraphic transfer and draft

接受电子汇票 - 中国 | SAP Help Portal 

best regards,

liling

entry.title: Building an ABAP RESTful Application
entry.content:
Hi, just going through this course https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/learn-the-basics-of-abap-programming-on-sap-btp and I think that the provided Groceries table definition script is maybe outdated, because when trying to generate ABAB Repository Objects, the validation status complains that:

Field for change user is missing in source reference ZAU_GROCERY type TABL.

Field for change user is missing in source reference ZAU_GROCERY type TABL.

Changing from "createdby : abap.char(12)" to "createdby : abp_creation_user" and from "lastchangedby : abap.char(12)" to "last_changed_by : abp_lastchange_user" makes it work.

It's not clear what to use, and there may be other ways to do it.

With kind regards,

Alex

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:

Thanks and Regards

Dhanush

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM Screen Personas - Field cannot be moved
entry.content: We have discovered that using the status and menu bars for placement of the RF buttons is great as they are responsive and also autoscales in size. However, when moving buttons back to the main screen everything falls apart and we lost the button completely 🙂 However, I don't think you support this officially so maybe to much to create a ticket.

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM Screen Personas - Field cannot be moved
entry.content: Aaah, is there no way of doing a comment with "row break"? When I press enter the comment is posted! Sorry for that.. We have however a couple of more things like the button in menus that are buggy and yes. Will try to put in some tickets on that when our release is done. Right now focus is on delivering in project.

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
Hi @Shilpa_Shankar ,

I have almost complete this task but facing issue in point c.

Please advise.

entry.title: Re: Express Document "update was cancelled" received from...
entry.content:
Hello @SUSHABHAN_MM 

The reason is that you care a material with automatic numbering. The system fetches next number from a number range assigned to the material type and tries to save the material with that number. However there is already another material created with the same number. Hence the dump. 

You need to correct the number range and at least modify its status.

This kind of errors occurs mostly due to number range transports, as such transport import also number range status to the destination system. That's why transporting number ranges is not automatic and is discouraged. Nevertheless, I think it's ok to transport them with care.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Validation and Substitution rules
entry.content:
Thank you sharing the knowledge. 

In HANA Public cloud , how we can this precondition ( Sum ) For .eg sum of total amount ?

Pls help us

entry.title: Re: Streamlining Document Management: DocuSign and SAP Sales Cloud V2 Integration via BTP
entry.content:
Hello Prasad, @pvsbprasad

Very detailed and helpful usecase blog 👍🏻

Kunal

entry.title: 回复： Custom Entity does not display all line items
entry.content:
Hi, you can try it. you must return the total counts, then use 'UP TO XXX ROWS OFFSET XXXX' return partial data for each requests.

DATA(lo_paging)  = io_request->get_paging( ).
DATA(lv_offset)  = lo_paging->get_offset( ).
DATA(lv_rows)    = lo_paging->get_page_size( ).
DATA(lv_max_rows) = COND #( WHEN lv_rows = 
              if_rap_query_paging=>page_size_unlimited THEN 0 ELSE lv_rows ).


IF io_request->is_total_numb_of_rec_requested( ) = abap_true.
      SELECT COUNT( * ) FROM i_maintenanceordertp WHERE (lv_filter) INTO @DATA(Lv_counts).
      io_response->set_total_number_of_records( Lv_counts ).
ENDIF.
SELECT * FROM i_maintenanceordertp WHERE (lv_filter)
      ORDER BY (lv_orderby_string) INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_items)
          UP TO @LV_max_rows ROWS OFFSET @LV_offset.
io_response->set_data( lt_items ).

entry.title: Re: OEE Trends Report in SAP DM
entry.content:
Hello Harsh,

you can fetch the OEE relevant data via public APIs on Business Accelerator Hub, see https://api.sap.com/api/sapdmi_vishleshki/overview

There is no API on the real-time KPIs being calculated.

HANA DB Live Connection with 2408 is READ-ONLY access. There is no support for creating custom stored procedure or anything similar.

We are planning to provide an OEE MDO based on which you will be able to calculate and expose OEE trend in one of the subsequent releases for SAP Digital Manufacturing.

Thanks,

Marcel

entry.title: Re: New End User File Upload in SAP Analytics Cloud QRC3 2024
entry.content: Great news, thanks for the update  👍

entry.title: Re: Analytical Table not showing criticality
entry.content: Thanks Chistopher, had same issue when using aggregations in a grid table and adding RequestAtLeast works for me. Funny thing is that the grid table without aggegrations worked, but it broke when adding SUM aggegrations.

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
Hi @diveshkalra ,

The task is to add 'Status text' field in the filter bar. As it has only 3 values we need to define an annotation which makes it is a value help where the values will be displayed and can be filtered on. 

Hint: Check the Annotation TechByte video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GXFHjq5L8M8&t=1030s

entry.title: Re: How to maintain the entries of the table TCOBM with a report
entry.content: Hi Lionel, is there any solution to the above problem？Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Incoming Payment Issue: No transaction type coulde be...
entry.content:
Solution: after talking to the bank to provide previous bank files and test them in the QAS we noticed the new incoming payment file contains one new item 'Fast Payment' which is not included in our customizing so therefore this was not able to load. We requested the bank to remove this new line while we need to work on the mapping and updating the payment customizing with the missing part which is newly added by the local bank. Hope this will help all in future. 

<Ntry>

VCOMK

<NtryDtls>

Regards,

Shilpa

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
@David_Chaviano 

Hello David,

I fall under below two category and wanted to switch my career in SAP.

  • People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts 
  • People looking to switch their careers mid-life

entry.title: Re: Unable to deploy iFlow in Integration Suite for Azure...
entry.content: In the Connection tab, the Alias should reference the credential (secure parameter) for the SAS token you created before, not the actual SAS token.

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
Hi Gaurav,

Thanks for the submission. Could you add search field and enable Description to be searched.

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
Hi @Shilpa_Shankar ,

I tried same way by following the youtube link but not sure where it's going wrong.

Below is the code:

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED

@EndUserText.label: 'CDS View entity'

@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true

@ObjectModel.usageType:{

serviceQuality: #X,

sizeCategory: #S,

dataClass: #MIXED

}

@UI.headerInfo.typeName: 'Travel'

@UI.headerInfo.typeNamePlural: 'Travels'

@Search.searchable: true

@ObjectModel.semanticKey: [ 'Description' ]

 

define view entity Ztravel_entity5 as select from ztravel_new5

association [0..1] to /DMO/I_Overall_Status_VH as _Status on _Status.OverallStatus = $projection.Status

{

@UI.lineItem: [{ position: 10 }]

@UI.selectionField: [{ position: 10 }]

key

travel_id as TravelId,

@UI.lineItem: [{ position: 20 }]

@Search.defaultSearchElement: true

@Search.fuzzinessThreshold: 0.90

description as Description,

@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'

@UI.lineItem: [{ position: 30 }]

total_price as TotalPrice,

currency_code as CurrencyCode,

@UI.lineItem: [{ position: 40 }]

concat_with_space( cast ( total_price as abap.char(25) ), currency_code, 1) as NewPriceCurrencyCode,

@UI.lineItem: [{ position: 50 }]

status as Status,

@UI.lineItem: [{ position: 60 }]

@UI.selectionField: [{ position: 20 }]

@Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ entity: {name: 'zhelp_new5', element: 'overallStatus' } }]

_Status._Text.Text as overallStatusText,

_Status

 

}

entry.title: Re: New End User File Upload in SAP Analytics Cloud QRC3 2024
entry.content:
Hi

We eventually managed to get the upload to work but seems to be very susceptible to the period/date selection that one chooses.

  1. Works with a calendar date
  2. Does not seem to work with a financial period

Regards

Derek
